blocks.text: Xinyuan Group
Premium Packaging Manufacturer in Vietnam
End-to-End Packaging Solutions for Global Brands
As an FSC® and ISO-certified manufacturer, Jinhao Group delivers corrugated, rigid, and folding boxes from Vietnam and China.
Beyond Borders, Precision in Every Print™ – delivering standardized packaging solutions through regional hubs for global brands.
To empower global brands with sustainable packaging and printing ecosystems — merging Asian manufacturing efficiency with global standards.
Printing Without Borders — blending global standards with local expertise to deliver consistency and quality worldwide.
Who We Are

Jinhao Xinyuan Group is one of Asia’s leading packaging manufacturers, integrating design, R&D, printing, and assembly. Our dual-hub network in Vietnam and China ensures speed, capacity, and precision for export packaging worldwide.
Our Global Network
“With production bases in Bac Ninh (Vietnam) and Dongguan (China), we deliver consistent quality, fast turnaround, and competitive production capacity across Asia.
Our Main Product Lines
Corrugated Boxes
Rigid & Gift Boxes
Folding Cartons
Labels & Manuals
Eco Packaging
Comprehensive Packaging Capabilities

“From concept to delivery, our teams manage every stage — design, printing, lamination, die-cutting, folding, gluing, and final assembly. Our facilities in Hai Duong, Bac Ninh, and Dongguan feature Heidelberg and KBA offset presses, automated corrugation lines, and precision finishing tools ensuring consistent quality and rapid turnaround.
Trusted by Global Brands

We serve retail, electronics, food & beverage, and cosmetics brands worldwide, with reliable logistics for export. With OEM & ODM experience and certifications including GMI, SMETA-4P, and ISTA, we ensure compliance, durability, and premium visual results.
Certified Quality & Sustainable Materials

We believe packaging should safeguard your product and the planet. All materials are FSC®-certified, recyclable, and responsibly sourced. We invest in eco-friendly inks, water-based coatings, and recyclable paperboard to help partners achieve their sustainability goals.
Partner With Us
Looking for a reliable packaging manufacturer in Vietnam? Our export team is ready to help with samples, design mock-ups, and fast production.
Frequently Asked Questions

We operate modern factories in Changping, Dongguan, China (20,000 sqm) and Bac Ninh, Vietnam (8 dedicated lines), equipped with fully and semi-automatic lines for both mass-printed cartons and precision handmade gift boxes.
We hold FSC, SMETA, CAPR, and ISO9001 certifications — fully meeting supplier approval standards for global brands such as L’Oréal and complying with EU/US environmental and ethical regulations.

Yes. Our Dongguan factory combines automated precision grooving and die-cutting with skilled manual wrapping teams. Both modes run simultaneously, covering everything from high-volume cartons to artisan-finish gift boxes.

We specialize in four core categories: ① Premium handmade rigid gift boxes ② High-end folding cartons ③ Corrugated shipping boxes ④ Paper-plastic composite packaging — serving cosmetics, electronics, food, and luxury goods industries.

We support offset printing, UV printing, hot foil stamping (gold/silver), embossing/debossing, matte/gloss lamination, and spot UV — fully customizable to your brand identity for maximum shelf impact.

Yes. Our FSC certification guarantees sustainably sourced paper. We also offer biodegradable materials and plastic-reduction solutions, helping brands comply with EU PPWR and North American EPR packaging regulations.
Yes. We have proven expertise in composite material processing, integrating PET, PP, and other plastics with paper substrates to achieve specialized protection and premium aesthetics.

Our MOQ is 1,000 units, which includes professional design support, material consulting, high-precision mass production, and full quality inspection — structured to maximize cost efficiency on our automated lines.

Yes. Our in-house design team assists with structural engineering, dieline creation, and visual artwork. Upon confirming a 1,000+ unit production intent, we produce physical samples to validate all craft details before full production.
We accept Adobe Illustrator (.AI), print-ready PDF (300 DPI minimum), and CDR formats. If you don’t have final artwork, our design team can create it from scratch based on your brand guidelines.

We run a full-cycle QC system: Incoming Quality Control (IQC) → In-Process Quality Control (IPQC) → Outgoing Quality Control (OQC), combining automated vision inspection with manual sampling to achieve 99%+ pass rate. Third-party inspection support is available upon request.
We use a standardized Color Management System (CMS) with spectrophotometer-based Delta-E measurement, keeping color deviation within international tolerance standards across all repeat orders.

FSC certification proves your packaging uses materials from certified sustainable forests — directly supporting your brand’s ESG reports and EU sustainability declarations. It also meets mandatory or recommended requirements from major retailers like Amazon and Target.

Standard folding carton orders of 1,000+ units: 15–20 business days. Handmade rigid gift boxes: approx. 25 business days. Samples: 5–7 business days. We recommend placing orders 4–6 weeks in advance during peak season.

Bac Ninh offers proximity to Noi Bai International Airport and Hai Phong Port. Vietnam’s FTAs — including EVFTA (EU) and UKVFTA (UK) — significantly reduce export tariffs, providing stronger supply chain resilience in today’s global trade environment.
We support FOB, CIF, and DDP trade terms, with the option for split shipments from either our China or Vietnam facilities. We also assist with connecting you to international freight forwarders.

Please provide: ① Box dimensions (L×W×H) ② Material and finish requirements ③ Design artwork (if available) ④ Target quantity. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a competitive quote for 1,000+ units, including material and finish recommendations.

faqs.q: Where are your factories located, and what production facilities do you have?
faqs.a: We operate modern factories in Changping, Dongguan, China (20,000 sqm) and Bac Ninh, Vietnam (8 dedicated lines), equipped with fully and semi-automatic lines for both mass-printed cartons and precision handmade gift boxes.

faqs.q: What international certifications do you hold? Are you approved to supply global brands?
faqs.a: We hold FSC, SMETA, CAPR, and ISO9001 certifications — fully meeting supplier approval standards for global brands such as L’Oréal and complying with EU/US environmental and ethical regulations.

faqs.q: Can you produce both handmade gift boxes and automated bulk cartons?
faqs.a: Yes. Our Dongguan factory combines automated precision grooving and die-cutting with skilled manual wrapping teams. Both modes run simultaneously, covering everything from high-volume cartons to artisan-finish gift boxes.

faqs.q: What types of packaging products do you manufacture?
faqs.a: We specialize in four core categories: ① Premium handmade rigid gift boxes ② High-end folding cartons ③ Corrugated shipping boxes ④ Paper-plastic composite packaging — serving cosmetics, electronics, food, and luxury goods industries.

faqs.q: What printing and surface finishing options do you offer?
faqs.a: We support offset printing, UV printing, hot foil stamping (gold/silver), embossing/debossing, matte/gloss lamination, and spot UV — fully customizable to your brand identity for maximum shelf impact.

faqs.q: Do you offer eco-friendly packaging solutions?
faqs.a: Yes. Our FSC certification guarantees sustainably sourced paper. We also offer biodegradable materials and plastic-reduction solutions, helping brands comply with EU PPWR and North American EPR packaging regulations.

faqs.q: Can you work with paper-plastic composites or other special materials?
faqs.a: Yes. We have proven expertise in composite material processing, integrating PET, PP, and other plastics with paper substrates to achieve specialized protection and premium aesthetics.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for custom packaging?
faqs.a: Our MOQ is 1,000 units, which includes professional design support, material consulting, high-precision mass production, and full quality inspection — structured to maximize cost efficiency on our automated lines.

faqs.q: Do you provide packaging design and sample prototyping services?
faqs.a: Yes. Our in-house design team assists with structural engineering, dieline creation, and visual artwork. Upon confirming a 1,000+ unit production intent, we produce physical samples to validate all craft details before full production.

faqs.q: What artwork file formats do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept Adobe Illustrator (.AI), print-ready PDF (300 DPI minimum), and CDR formats. If you don’t have final artwork, our design team can create it from scratch based on your brand guidelines.

faqs.q: How do you ensure consistent quality in mass production?
faqs.a: We run a full-cycle QC system: Incoming Quality Control (IQC) → In-Process Quality Control (IPQC) → Outgoing Quality Control (OQC), combining automated vision inspection with manual sampling to achieve 99%+ pass rate. Third-party inspection support is available upon request.

faqs.q: How do you maintain color consistency across production batches?
faqs.a: We use a standardized Color Management System (CMS) with spectrophotometer-based Delta-E measurement, keeping color deviation within international tolerance standards across all repeat orders.

faqs.q: What practical value does FSC certification offer for EU/US buyers?
faqs.a: FSC certification proves your packaging uses materials from certified sustainable forests — directly supporting your brand’s ESG reports and EU sustainability declarations. It also meets mandatory or recommended requirements from major retailers like Amazon and Target.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time for bulk orders?
faqs.a: Standard folding carton orders of 1,000+ units: 15–20 business days. Handmade rigid gift boxes: approx. 25 business days. Samples: 5–7 business days. We recommend placing orders 4–6 weeks in advance during peak season.

faqs.q: What are the advantages of manufacturing and exporting from Bac Ninh, Vietnam?
faqs.a: Bac Ninh offers proximity to Noi Bai International Airport and Hai Phong Port. Vietnam’s FTAs — including EVFTA (EU) and UKVFTA (UK) — significantly reduce export tariffs, providing stronger supply chain resilience in today’s global trade environment.

faqs.q: What trade terms and shipping options do you support?
faqs.a: We support FOB, CIF, and DDP trade terms, with the option for split shipments from either our China or Vietnam facilities. We also assist with connecting you to international freight forwarders.

faqs.q: How can I get a formal quote quickly?
faqs.a: Please provide: ① Box dimensions (L×W×H) ② Material and finish requirements ③ Design artwork (if available) ④ Target quantity. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a competitive quote for 1,000+ units, including material and finish recommendations.
